title: Calc chart creation: v9 creates and relocates the exact chart
instruction: Create a clustered column chart showing the Sales and COGS data for each week in a new sheet named "Sheet2". Set the chart title as "Sales & COGS".
why_selected: The chart wizard, title entry, and chart relocation are directly visible, making the successful skill-guided sequence easy to contrast.

no_skills.caption: No-skills: selects data and clicks chart-related controls, but then cuts/pastes around the workbook and never leaves a correct clustered chart with the required title on Sheet2.
